summary: PR 2209 merged the former itchicoritaleaf translation unit into itchicorita, marked itchicorita as Matching, updated splits/symbol metadata, moved leaf declarations into itchicorita.h, removed the leaf include, and factored duplicated Chicorita physics into a static inline helper. The bot report shows 13 new matches under main/melee/it/items/itchicorita and corresponding broken matches under the removed itchicoritaleaf unit.

key_files.role: Primary source file; absorbs itchicoritaleaf code, adds leaf ItemStateTable/functions, marks duplicated physics through static inline itChicorita_Phys, and changes Chicorita motion physics wrappers.
Deleted source file; its functions and data are moved into itchicorita.c.
Deleted header; declarations are moved into itchicorita.h.
Header now declares both Chicorita and Chicorita Leaf functions and ItemStateTable symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itchicorita.h adds 2C9B20-2C9D20 declarations and it_803F7AC8

key_files.role: Split metadata merges itchicorita and itchicoritaleaf ranges into one itchicorita.c text/data range.
Symbol metadata changes two sdata2 floats at 0x804DD330 and 0x804DD334 from global names to local labels.
Build configuration marks itchicorita.c as Matching and removes separate itchicoritaleaf object entry.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py Pokémon item object list

key_files.role: Include cleanup removes itchicoritaleaf.h include after leaf declarations move into itchicorita.h.

what_changed.text: Merged the separate itchicoritaleaf translation unit into itchicorita by extending itchicorita split ranges from text 0x802C9588-0x802C9D40 and data 0x803F7A98-0x803F7AD8, deleting the standalone itchicoritaleaf.c split.
Updated configure.py to replace NonMatching itchicorita.c plus NonMatching itchicoritaleaf.c entries with one Matching itchicorita.c object.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report matched code +368 bytes and 13 new matches

what_changed.text: Moved leaf function prototypes and it_803F7AC8 declaration from itchicoritaleaf.h into itchicorita.h, then deleted itchicoritaleaf.h.
Factored duplicated Chicorita motion physics logic into static inline itChicorita_Phys and made both itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys call it.
Changed sdata2 symbols it_804DD330 and it_804DD334 into local labels @153 and @274.
Bot report recorded new matches in main/melee/it/items/itchicorita for leaf functions/data/sdata2 and small improvements for itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys.

smart_moves.text: Removed a redundant leaf header/source split after moving leaf declarations and definitions into the parent Chicorita file, reducing include surface and aligning configure/splits with a single matching object.
Extracted shared duplicated physics code into a static inline helper rather than retaining two nearly identical function bodies.
Kept existing item fields and typed item/article access paths such as xCC_item_attr, xDD4_itemVar.chicorita, xC4_article_data, and GET_ITEM instead of introducing raw pointer arithmetic.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When two closely related item translation units are contiguous in text/data and one is a sub-article of the other, matching may require checking whether the split should be one parent item TU rather than separate parent/child TUs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt merges itchicorita.c and itchicoritaleaf.c ranges
raw_diff: configure.py one Matching itchicorita.c entry
raw_diff: deleted itchicoritaleaf.c moved into itchicorita.c

decomp_lessons.lesson: Duplicated item physics bodies that differ only by motion-state wrapper can sometimes match as a shared static inline helper called by each state-specific Phys function.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys reach 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Local-label sdata2 ownership can accompany a TU merge; in this PR two formerly global float symbols became local labels under the merged itchicorita object.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt merged .sdata2 remains under itchicorita range

naming_conventions.text: Leaf callbacks use mixed existing naming styles: Logic30 functions use itChicoritaLeaf with capital Leaf, while motion callbacks retain itChicoritaleaf spelling.
The helper name itChicorita_Phys is semantic and local-static-inline scoped, while unresolved address-style functions such as it_802C9B20 and it_802C9CC0 remain address-style.
Local variables in the spawn function use role names such as spawn, chicorita, attr, and chicorita_gobj, consistent with conservative semantic naming where roles are visible in the code.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a static inline helper to share physics implementation while preserving separately exported motion-state physics functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report 100% after for both physics functions
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The diff shows the helper and bot match result, but does not include manual objdiff command output or author rationale.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Kept a goto label block_11 inside the helper to preserve control-flow shape for the fall-speed update.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: This is generated-looking control flow; the PR evidence supports it as part of a matched result but does not document alternatives tried.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK(12) in itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_Spawned after moving the function into itchicorita.c.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: PAD_STACK use has match-report support but no explicit narrow build/objdiff rationale in the PR text.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted split and configure metadata so the moved functions are matched under main/melee/it/items/itchicorita rather than the removed itchicoritaleaf unit.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches under itchicorita and broken matches under itchicoritaleaf
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The bot report's broken matches are expected from the removed unit, but the PR body provides no written explanation.

review_feedback.text: Automated report for GALE01 showed matched code +0.01% (+368 bytes), linked code +0.05% (+1976 bytes), linked data +0.01% (+72 bytes), with 13 new matches under main/melee/it/items/itchicorita and 11 broken matches under the removed itchicoritaleaf unit.

evidence_refs: raw_diff: complete diff, 14395 chars, not truncated
text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and bot report
notes: Strong evidence for file changes, split/config/header movement, and bot-reported match outcomes.
PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so author intent and reviewer rationale are not evidenced.
No manual build, objdiff, checkdiff, or adjacent regression output is included beyond the decomp-dev bot report.
The bot report lists broken matches for itchicoritaleaf; based on the diff these correspond to deleting/moving that unit, but the PR text does not explicitly explain them.
PAD_STACK and goto-shaped control flow are present, but the slice does not document alternative attempts or why these tactics were necessary.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Contiguous parent/child item TUs may need split consolidation
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2209, itchicoritaleaf.c was removed as a separate object and its text/data ranges were folded into itchicorita.c; configure.py then marked the combined itchicorita.c object Matching, and the bot report showed leaf functions newly matched under itchicorita.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted itchicoritaleaf.c and added functions to itchicorita.c

accepted_candidate_records.title: Static inline helper for duplicated item physics wrappers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2209 replaced duplicated bodies of itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys with a shared static inline itChicorita_Phys helper; the bot report shows both wrappers moved from 98.37% to 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: itchicoritaleaf removed as separate source/header in PR 2209
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2209 deleted src/melee/it/items/itchicoritaleaf.c and src/melee/it/items/itchicoritaleaf.h, moving leaf definitions and declarations into src/melee/it/items/itchicorita.c and src/melee/it/items/itchicorita.h.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path ownership fact for future lookups; requires curator review before adding to source-owned path facts.

source_update_candidates.title: itchicorita split range expanded in PR 2209
source_update_candidates.text: config/GALE01/splits.txt changed itchicorita.c to own text 0x802C9588-0x802C9D40 and data 0x803F7A98-0x803F7AD8 after absorbing the prior itchicoritaleaf ranges.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is source/path metadata rather than a general decomp lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: Document evidence expectations for PAD_STACK in matched moved functions
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2209 includes PAD_STACK(12) in itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_Spawned and the bot report shows the function matched, but the PR has no manual rationale. Consider whether standards should remind authors to note why PAD_STACK remains when moving already-matched functions across TUs.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential clarification only; existing matching-tactics standard already covers explicit evidence, so curator may reject as redundant.

rejection_notes: Do not infer a broad rule that all item leaf/projectile files should be merged into parent item files; PR evidence only supports Chicorita/Chicorita Leaf.
Do not treat the broken itchicoritaleaf bot entries as regressions without context; the diff deletes that object and moves the code, but the slice does not include a human explanation.
Do not promote PAD_STACK(12) as generally acceptable style from this PR alone; the evidence is only a bot match report and the existing standards require narrow justification.
Do not claim human reviewer approval rationale; there were no review comments in the loaded slice.
